## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --locked --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --locked --workspace`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:scanner`

## Notes

List any known limitations, follow-ups, or docs changes.
